summary: Completed testing of customer registration with email verification flow and Apple design for admin pages. All backend tests (8/8) passed. All frontend tests passed. Key features verified: Header Sign In/Up navigation with correct tab state, registration shows verification step with password and OTP, verification with correct OTP issues JWT, verification with wrong OTP shows error, admin login with Apple design, admin dashboard with stat cards, admin menu with category pills, mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu.

issues: React warning: `value` prop on select should not be null - minor console warning when location is not yet loaded

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint returns 200
Backend: POST /api/customer/register returns needs_verification=true and verification_code
Backend: POST /api/customer/verify with correct OTP issues JWT token
Backend: POST /api/customer/verify with wrong OTP returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/customer/verify for non-existent customer returns 404
Backend: Duplicate email registration returns 400
Backend: Admin login with valid credentials succeeds
Backend: Admin login with invalid credentials returns 401
Frontend: Header 'Sign In' button navigates to /customer-auth with login tab active
Frontend: Header 'Sign Up' button navigates to /customer-auth with register tab active
Frontend: Customer registration shows verification step with password and OTP code
Frontend: Verification with correct OTP redirects to /menu-catalog
Frontend: Verification with wrong OTP shows 'Invalid verification code' error
Frontend: Admin login page has Apple design (dark pill button, rounded inputs, ChefHat icon)
Frontend: Admin login with valid credentials navigates to /admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard has dark sidebar with nav items (Dashboard, Menu, Orders, Settings, Wallets, Reports)
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows stat cards (Menu Items, Total Orders, Residents, Sites Open)
Frontend: Admin menu page has Apple-style header with 'Add Item' pill button and category pills
Frontend: Admin site settings has Apple-style header with 'Add Location' button
Frontend: Admin sidebar hamburger menu works on mobile (375px)
Frontend: Admin dashboard renders correctly on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: AdminMenuManagement has a React warning about null value prop on select - should use empty string or undefined instead of null for initial selectedLocationId

test_credentials.test_customers: Created during tests with auto-generated passwords

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the review request have been tested and verified working: 1) Header Sign In/Up buttons navigate to /customer-auth with correct tab state (login/register). 2) Customer registration now shows verification step with generated password and OTP code. 3) POST /api/customer/register returns needs_verification=true and verification_code (when Resend is not configured). 4) POST /api/customer/verify exchanges OTP for JWT token. 5) All admin pages have Apple design with dark sidebar (#1D1D1F), Outfit font, and monochrome palette. 6) Mobile responsiveness works with hamburger menu toggle. The previous bug from iteration_13 (registration success screen not shown) has been fixed - now shows verification step with password before redirect.
